sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65451" key="megalopa/qeia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεγᾰλο-πάθεια</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πᾰ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n65451.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">patience, fortitude</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.551c</biblScope> </bibl> (s.v.l.).</sense> </entryFree>
